channel.title: Frinky
channel.description: Frinky's portfolio of games, updates, and development posts.

item.title: Bang Shoot
item.description: A fast-paced arena shooter where you wield two weapons at once across unique battlegrounds.

item.title: LuaRuntime Plugin (UE 5.7)
item.description: The LuaRuntime plugin for Unreal Engine 5.7 is now public.

item.title: How to wipe your Transience save
item.description: Steps to wipe your save files to fix launch issues and reset progress.

item.title: New website
item.description: Released a new version of the website.

item.title: Transience
item.description: Become an Accountant - a hired mercenary who keeps the books balanced by any means necessary.

item.title: Screen Wrap
item.description: A short top-down atmospheric puzzle game about boundary warp and screen wrap.

item.title: Dishwashing Simulator
item.description: A short, unique survival-farming-base-building-tycoon-horror game where washing dishes is the core loop.

item.title: Infinite Golf
item.description: A zen-like golf experience where you can relax while sinking shots.

item.title: Ground Unbound
item.description: A procedurally generated, high-intensity movement shooter with roguelike progression.

item.title: Chaos
item.description: An online FPS focused on destruction, explosions, and arcade chaos.

item.title: I was born
item.description: Spawned into the world on this day.
